calendar.matters:
PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Pettigrew (Ex Wife) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Commissioner Sue Kaplan recused herself and explained that the matter could be continued if Ms. Pettigrew was here to object to the petition. Ms. Pettigrew stated that she was in the dark about this matter, that she wanted to know if she should be included in the matter and that she was going to speak to Counsel. The matter remained granted. The order was signed by another Judical Officer.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
